content:
## Acme — Core Product Thesis (hardened 2026-06-05, thesis-under-test)

Developers lose hours tracking down which tool broke the pipeline. The pain is observability-at-integration: knowing at a glance which component is misbehaving, not digging through logs. Hardened 2026-06-05 as the live strategic anchor — every feature decision should trace back to this.

## Acme — Product Scope

Acme ships as a CLI plus a desktop app. The CLI targets developers who live in the terminal; the desktop app serves less terminal-fluent teammates who need the same pipeline visibility without command-line friction. Both surfaces share the same underlying engine.

# Hosted deploy smoke

Manual curl checklist run after each deploy to verify the box is up. (stale: superseded by CI pipeline — manual steps retired last sprint.)

## Stack conventions

TypeScript everywhere; pnpm workspaces; conventional commits.
